positive: Intricate botanical illustration featuring glowing bioluminescent forest elements, such as ornate ferns, mystical mushrooms, and luminous winding vines. Centrally composed, surrounded by minimalist crescent moons and constellations. Style is highly detailed neo-ethereal ink drawing with clean, bold black outlines and saturated pops of glowing sapphire blue, emerald green, and warm gold. High contrast, tattoo flash style, perfect for screen printing on apparel, vector art, symmetrical composition, deep indigo background, minimalist kawaii elements.
